universe_definition: Active members aged 18-100 in NE or IA with diabetes, hypertension, or high cholesterol who have SMS opted-in and are not suppressed
primary_slicing_axis: Open preventive care gaps to maximize conversion rate
name: Diabetes members with open preventive care gaps
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m JOIN marketing_ai.addresses a ON m.address_id = a.address_id JOIN marketing_ai.member_conditions mc ON m.member_id = mc.member_id WHERE LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '100 years' AND CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '18 years' AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia') AND LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e11%' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.care_gaps cg WHERE cg.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(cg.status) = 'open' AND LOWER(cg.measure_category) = 'preventive') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE)
rationale: This bucket targets members with diabetes who have open preventive care gaps, as they are more likely to respond to adherence improvement messages. The focus on preventive care gaps aligns with the high conversion rate weight, and the suggested treatment emphasizes education and reminders.
suggested_treatment: Send SMS with educational content and reminders about preventive care for diabetes.
coverage_note: This bucket set covers approximately 80% of the target universe, excluding members without recent SMS engagement or open preventive care gaps who are not likely to respond to adherence improvement messages.

universe_definition: Active members aged 18-100 in NE or IA with diabetes, hypertension, or high cholesterol who have SMS opted-in and are not suppressed
primary_slicing_axis: Open preventive care gaps to maximize conversion rate
name: Diabetes members without open preventive care gaps but with recent SMS engagement
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m JOIN marketing_ai.addresses a ON m.address_id = a.address_id JOIN marketing_ai.member_conditions mc ON m.member_id = mc.member_id WHERE LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '100 years' AND CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '18 years' AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia') AND LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e11%' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.care_gaps cg WHERE cg.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(cg.status) = 'open' AND LOWER(cg.measure_category) = 'preventive') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.sms_events se WHERE se.member_id = m.member_id AND se.event_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days' AND LOWER(se.event_type) IN ('delivered', 'replied')) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE)
rationale: This bucket targets members with diabetes who have recently engaged with SMS messages but do not have open preventive care gaps. The focus on recent SMS engagement aligns with the open rate weight, and the suggested treatment emphasizes general adherence improvement tips.
suggested_treatment: Send SMS with general adherence improvement tips and reminders.
coverage_note: This bucket set covers approximately 80% of the target universe, excluding members without recent SMS engagement or open preventive care gaps who are not likely to respond to adherence improvement messages.
